title: Implicit int-to-bool conversion for led_configured
description:
Location: firmware/bridge-zephyr/src/main.c:35,119

led_configured is declared as static bool but set with gpio_pin_configure_dt return value logic:
- Line 119: ret = gpio_pin_configure_dt(...) which returns int
- Line 120: if (ret < 0) { error }
- Line 122: else { led_configured = true; }

Current code is correct - it explicitly sets true. However, the pattern could be fragile if someone refactors to led_configured = (ret >= 0) which would set led_configured to 1 (true) but not the canonical true value on some platforms.

This is a style note, not a bug. CLOSE if deemed too minor.
